caption:
Group workout energy! 💪🔥

Nothing beats the power of training together. Our PE classes are bringing the intensity this semester!

#teamfitness #schoolsports

Solo training grind

Dedicated work on the track pays off. Keep pushing your limits!

#gym #training

Our fitness facility is ready for you

Freshly set up and prepped for tomorrow's sessions.

#fitnessspace

Strength training day with the squad!

Our students are putting in the work this semester. Team effort, team results!

#teamfitness #schoolsports

Morning run dedication

Consistency is key. Putting in the miles before school starts.

#gym #training

Empty gym full potential

Weekend quiet before the Monday rush.

#fitnessspace

Dance fitness energy!

Our community fitness class brought the energy today. Group workouts hit different!

#teamfitness #schoolsports

Track work in progress

Solo drills building speed and endurance for the season ahead.

#gym #training

The calm before the storm

Gym is set up and ready for this week's PE classes.

#fitnessspace
Fresh out of the booth — '67 fastback body work is 80 percent there. Classic Car Show in December is the goal.
302 V8 back together and it fires clean. Three years of nights in the back bay paying off.
Brisket on the Oklahoma Joe's since 4 AM. Ghost pepper rub, low and slow to 203.
Ghost peppers and habaneros came in hot this year. Smoking a batch for the sauce.
Hunter HawkEye alignment rack demo today. This changes the shop's whole front-end game.
Cowboys Sunday at the shop. Signed Romo jersey watching over the bay as always.
New Autel MaxiSys pulling codes the old Snap-on couldn't touch on the 2021 diesels.
Finished a clutch job on a customer's F-250 before lunch. Diesel done right.
Rio Bravo auto shop Saturday. Eight kids, oil changes and brake basics. Teaching the next crew.
Elephant Butte at sunrise, catfish biting. Ugly Stik and a thermos of black coffee.
Reynolds Custom Interiors laid out the pony upholstery samples. Red and black for the fastback.
Alignment rack landed. Southwest Equipment crew set it dead level.
Little League Thunderbolts took the field at Riverside Park. Proud to sponsor these kids.
Beth's apple turnovers made it to the shop. Best perk of being married 22 years.
Back bay progress — test-fit the console and dash on the Mustang tonight.
Dallas defense gave me heartburn but a win's a win. Fantasy league still alive.
Smoked a full packer brisket for the church potluck. First Baptist eats good on Sundays.
Rebuilt a valve body on a Tahoe transmission. Eddie's specialty, my second set of hands.
Fresh drip at 5:30 AM, bay doors up. Thirty-five years and I still love the first coffee.
Guitar on the porch after supper. A little Turnpike Troubadours to end the day.
Customer's classic Bronco in for a tune. Carburetors keep the old skills sharp.
Habanero harvest smoked and jarred. Beth won't come near the kitchen when I'm cooking these.
The fastback in primer under the lights. Paint booth is next.
F-250 hit 85k. Ran the diesel service myself over the weekend.
Bobby traced an intermittent electrical gremlin on a Jeep. Careful hands, best diagnostic guy I've got.
Sunday walk with Beth before the heat. Good talk, good pace.
Swap meet find — correct '67 tail light bezels. The Mustang parts hunt never ends.
Estimates written, board's full, coffee's cold. Another good day at Davis Auto.
